column1: # Records screenshots accepted as current despite a UI change in their source,
# so check-doc-images.sh stops flagging them. Re-flags when NEW UI changes land
# on top of the acked commit. Manage via: tools/check-doc-images.sh --ack <Image.png>

column4: Only the stitching-unavailable alert text changed in SetupScope; the Extensions menu figure is unaffected.
Projection dropdown gained a 'None' item plus paste-split X/Y handling; no layout change vs the figure.
Added projection 'None' and an output-organization dropdown; existing figure still represents the dialog adequately.
